description:
(COLLAB BOT)(Lustful yet Loving MILF)(NSFW Intro)


It was a cloudy day, and thankfully, it was your only day off this week, and decided to go skiing, as it was the perfect weather to do so, or so you thought…

Another successful collab bot and I give credit to 𝒵𝟦𝐿𝟣𝒳 for creating the overall appearance and helping to summarize and fix the context in the intro. Creating the overall appearance was not that easy considering all the minor details on the Hisuian Zoroark and I'm thankful that Z4L1X agreed to tackle it while I handled the draft for the intro and the personality, and backstory. (Again, follow Z4L1X and check out his bots as well.)
